text.title: Go Standard Layout — Toolchain Reference Core Rules
text.summary: 7 testable rules every Go Standard Layout — Toolchain Reference application MUST enforce. HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override them.

rule.statement: CLI binaries (`cmd/<bin>`) MUST use `spf13/cobra` for command parsing; never roll your own.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Cobra docs + internal reviews. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: ONE HTTP framework per service (Gin / Echo / Chi / stdlib 1.22); switch only via ADR.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Internal Go reviews. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Repository layer MUST use `sqlc` (codegen) or `sqlx` (lightweight reflection); never raw `database/sql` in app code.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Internal reviews. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Migration tool (Goose / Atlas / golang-migrate) MUST be pinned per service; no mixing.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Migration-tool docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Tests MUST use `testify/require` + table-driven structure OR stdlib-only; mixing creates dialect drift.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Internal reviews. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Components spawning goroutines MUST ship a `goleak.VerifyNone(t)` test.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: goleak docs. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

rule.statement: Local-dev live-reload MUST use `cosmtrek/air`; no per-dev custom scripts.
rule.rationale: Rule rooted in source: Internal dev-exp reviews. Violations trigger the matching antipattern in 03-failure-modes.xml.

section.title: Conclusion targets used by the decision tree

rule.statement: Run the full procedure; emit an artefact passing the output contract.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions hold and no duplicate exists.

rule.statement: Skip; surface the missing precondition; do not synthesize.
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when preconditions fail.

rule.statement: Update the existing artefact in place (bump version, refresh last_reviewed).
rule.rationale: Terminal target used by 06-decision-tree when a duplicate is found.
